description_long: This is a bamboo-handled toothbrush with a natural wood finish and a simple, straight silhouette. The handle is smooth and tapers slightly towards the bristle head, which is oval-shaped and densely packed with short, white synthetic bristles. The bristles are arranged in several neat rows, forming a uniform, flat brushing surface. There are no visible logos, color accents, or grip textures on the handle, giving it a minimalist and eco-friendly appearance. The overall design is functional and straightforward, with a focus on sustainability and simplicity. No packaging or branding is visible on the object.
description: A minimalist bamboo toothbrush with a smooth, natural wood handle and densely packed white bristles in an oval head. The design is simple, eco-friendly, and unbranded.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the bamboo handle and the oval head with white bristles clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the handle and the straight, flat arrangement of the bristles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the smooth bamboo handle with no visible bristles or markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the thin profile and bristle arrangement from the other side.
attribute_bristle_arrangement: The bristles are arranged in several straight, parallel rows forming a flat, oval-shaped brushing surface. The bristles are densely packed and uniform in height, with no visible multi-level or angled features.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is straight, smooth, and tapers slightly towards the bristle head, with a natural bamboo finish and no added grip texture or color accents.
